name: Cockroach Nymph
description: The Cockroach Nymph is the juvenile form of the cockroach in Grounded 2. It usually appears in swarms around trash, leftovers, and cluttered spaces, where one seems harmless but a whole pack turns ugly very quickly.
behavior: It moves quickly, changes direction without warning, and rarely stays still for long. Most of the time it roams as part of a swarm, as if the whole group shares the same restless pattern.
interactionWithPlayer: It usually ignores the player until you hit it, another nymph, or a nearby cockroach. Once one of them turns hostile, the rest tend to pile in and the fight escalates immediately.
interactionWithCreatures: Most creatures let them pass, though larger predators will crush them if they get the chance. Their real strength is not controlling space, but overwhelming it when they clump together.
strategy: Break the swarm the moment it activates. If you let several surround you, even a simple fight turns into a constant drain on rhythm, health, and space.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 15 Elemental Resistance Fresh(-25% Damage)-or- Spicy(-25% Damage) Buildup Effect Buildup Resistance Chill(-50% Buildup) Cockroach Nymph

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick basic attack at close range.
